description: Verizon Fios ZIP 11743 lineup with aliases from Strong8K, XMLTV EPG, HDHomeRun, and TV Everywhere M3U sources.
source: Gracenote lineup USA-NY67791-DEFAULT, supplemented with the Verizon Fios all-channel database and known inactive seasonal channel ranges
notes: Aliases include curated Strong8K stream names plus Gracenote callSign, channelId, station id, event callSign, and applicable FiOS SD/HD twin callsigns. Generic affiliate names were intentionally excluded to avoid matching the wrong local affiliate. Gracenote affiliateName values are included as aliases; empty/null and overly generic INDEPENDENT values are excluded.

alias_sources: Gracenote affiliateName and affiliateCallSign matched by exact FiOS channel number and local SD/HD twin number
xmlguide.xmltv: exact <channel> display-name values matched by FiOS channel number
hdhr-lineup.m3u and channels.m3u: stream display names and tvg-name values matched to the FiOS lineup

m3u_alias_matching.matching_policy: HDHomeRun entries matched by exact FiOS channel number. TV Everywhere entries matched by exact normalized name, with only REELZ and ROARTV added as manually reviewed brand matches.
